name: TiVo Corporation
description: TiVo is a prominent technology company, now a subsidiary of Xperi Inc., renowned for pioneering the digital video recorder (DVR). The company specializes in entertainment technology, offering advanced solutions such as the TiVo OS for smart TVs, the DTS AutoStage video service, and various streaming and recording hardware. By integrating content discovery and management across multiple platforms, TiVo aims to simplify the viewing experience for consumers. Today, TiVo continues to innovate in the connected home and automotive entertainment sectors, leveraging its extensive intellectual property portfolio to deliver personalized, user-friendly media experiences globally.
